_meta.description: Flat codebase index. Query this before reading any file. One entry per file. Update after every approved change.
_meta.howToQuery: Filter by domain or name. Navigate to path. Read only that file.
_meta.howToUpdate: After approved change: update summary and lastUpdated for affected entries. Add new entry for new files. Remove entry for deleted files.

index.purpose: Design Evaluator persona — world-class outside eye, runs cold after UX gate on new screens/DESIGN.md/token changes; BLOCKs only on generic AI-generated feel; session model

Engineering Manager persona — architecture, tech decisions, delivery risk
Product Manager persona — features, roadmap, user flows, scope

Maker-checker flow, model assignments, gate batching, escalation — frontend sequence UX -> Design Evaluator -> EL (EL always final)
Master constitution — personas, standards, non-negotiables, file pointers

Design system single source of truth — agent guide preamble, S0 visual theme (5 signature moves + AI-template anti-patterns), S0.1 breakpoints, tokens, typography, spacing, S5 15-item interaction checklist, S6 patterns (incl ConsequenceLine), voice

index.path: Meta Business Agent mdh_spices postman_collection 8 July v2.json
index.purpose: Postman collection — Meta Business Agent API calls for mdh_spices test business (8 July v2)
Running task list — 22 tasks covering audit fixes, architecture decisions, implementation, deployment
Approved tools and versions — Shadcn/ui + Tailwind replaces Ant Design as of 2026-07-20
Lombok config — copyableAnnotations includes @Qualifier so it forwards to generated constructors
Maven build — Spring Boot 3.3.2, Java 21, JJWT RS256, Testcontainers MySQL+Redis, RestClient (no WebFlux)
Spring Boot entry point — validates NODE_ID env var on startup, fails fast if missing
400 exception — thrown for business rule violations
Global exception handler — maps NotFoundException→404, BusinessException→400, validation errors→400
404 exception — thrown when entity not found
TSID ID generator — Hibernate IdentifierGenerator. 42-bit timestamp + 10-bit NODE_ID + 12-bit seq. NODE_ID from env var.
Generic API response wrapper — ok(data), ok(), error(message)
JWT auth filter — reads access_token from HttpOnly cookie. Logs JWT parse failures at DEBUG level (not warn — routine expired tokens would flood logs).
RS256 JWT — reads key pair from file paths (jwt.private-key-path, jwt.public-key-path). Generates and validates access tokens.
Static helper to read current TenantDetails (tenantId/userId) from Spring SecurityContext
Auth business logic — register, login, refresh, logout. httpOnly cookies. Redis lockout (5 fails → 15min). Refresh token rotation with reuse detection.
Authenticated principal record carrying tenantId + userId, set by JWT filter
RabbitMQ config — webhook.raw queue with DLQ, exchange, bindings
Two Redis databases — DB0=cacheRedisTemplate(@Primary), DB1=securityRedisTemplate. Both LettuceConnectionFactory beans.
Spring Security config - CSRF disabled (stateless JWT API), auth endpoints public, JWT filter + RateLimitFilter wired before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter, BCrypt cost 12
Agent REST endpoints - CRUD incl PUT /{id}, POST /generate-defaults (Claude wizard defaults), deploy/pause, skills/faq/files/websites subresources, phone bind
Agent create/update request DTO — name, customerFacingName, businessDescription, systemPrompt, tone, language, behaviorRules
PUT /agents/{id}/phone body — phoneNumberId + internal wabaId
FAQ create request DTO — question + answer with validation
Wizard auto-generation request - businessDescription max 200
Wizard defaults response - generated flag, tone/language/behaviorRules, 5 FAQ pairs; fallback() when Claude unavailable
Agent skill create request DTO
Agent knowledge website URL request DTO

Agent entity - TSID PK (JSON string via ToStringSerializer), accountId, displayName, customerFacingName, Channel enum (locked after create), tone, language, behaviorRules, systemPrompt, Status, phone binding
AgentFaq entity — TSID PK, agentId, accountId, question, answer
AgentFile entity — TSID PK, agentId, accountId, fileId (Meta file handle), filename, mimeType
AgentSkill entity — TSID PK, agentId, accountId, skill instructions
AgentWebsite entity — TSID PK, agentId, accountId, url. Meta crawls natively.
AgentWebsitePage entity — TSID PK, websiteId, accountId, page URL
AgentFaq repo - findAllByAgentId, findByIdAndAgentId (fullTextSearch removed with SearchService)
JPA repository for AgentFile knowledge uploads
Agent JPA repository — findByIdAndAccountId for tenant isolation
JPA repository for AgentSkill
AgentWebsitePage repo - deleteAllByWebsiteId (fullTextSearch removed with SearchService)
JPA repository for AgentWebsite knowledge sources
Claude wizard defaults - strict-JSON prompt, fence stripping, try/catch to fallback (timeouts live on ClaudeApiClient)
Deploy/pause via Meta settings PUT — deploy blocked until phone bound; Meta first, DB second
Agent domain service - accountId-scoped CRUD, updateAgent enforces channel lock, bindPhone with WABA ownership + phone membership checks, skills/faq/files/websites
Crawls agent knowledge websites, stores page content (AgentWebsitePage) for wizard knowledge step
REST endpoints for dashboard analytics — message volume, sessions, agent performance
Hourly rollup entity for agent message/session metrics (MySQL, ClickHouse dropped 2026-07-19)
Session window entity for conversation analytics
Normalized webhook event entity for analytics pipeline
JPA repository for AgentPerformanceHourly rollups
JPA repository for ConversationSession
JPA repository for WebhookEvent
Analytics ingest listener, hourly rollup, summary/hourly queries. Tenant isolation: verifyAgentOwnership (findByIdAndAccountId) runs BEFORE any query, fails closed with NotFoundException
REST endpoints for inbox — list conversations, messages per conversation (tenant-scoped)
Conversation entity — tenant/agent/customer thread with status + last message metadata
Message entity — direction, type (text/media), status, external Meta message id (idempotency)
Record: customerPhone, metaMessageId, textBody, messageType, contentJson — output of InboundMessageParser
Record: metaMessageId, status, recipientPhone — output of StatusUpdateParser
Conversation JPA repository
Message JPA repository — findByMetaMessageId for status update routing

Thin coordinator — parse→persist→analytics. Routes: inbound messages→ConversationStore.saveInbound; status webhooks (delivered/read/failed)→updateMessageStatus; sent status→saveOutbound (Decision D1). markProcessing/markProcessed/markFailed are package-private @Transactional.
All DB reads/writes for conversations and messages — findOrCreate, saveInbound (contentType+contentJson, lastMessageAt in same tx), saveOutbound (nullable content), updateMessageStatus
Parses raw Meta webhook JSON → Optional<InboundMessage>. All types persisted. Uses .at() safe path. text→textBody; image/audio/video/document/template/interactive→contentJson.
Sends reply to Meta API. Returns confirmed message ID. Throws BusinessException if Meta returns no ID — no UUID fallback.
Parses Meta status webhook (value.statuses[0]) → Optional<StatusUpdate>. Uses .at() for safe nested path access.
Auth endpoints — POST /register, /login, /refresh, /logout. Uses HttpServletResponse for cookie management.
Auth response DTO — userId, accountId, email, role. No tokens (tokens in httpOnly cookies).
Login request DTO — email, password
Refresh-token request DTO for /auth/refresh
Register request DTO — email, password, companyName
BusinessAccount entity — TSID PK, company name, email, passwordHash
RefreshTokenFamily entity — familyId (UUID), userId, accountId, tokenHash (SHA-256), revoked flag, revokedReason, expiresAt
User entity — TSID PK, accountId FK, email, passwordHash, Role(owner/admin/agent), Status(active/inactive/suspended)
BusinessAccount JPA repository
RefreshTokenFamily JPA repository — findById(familyId)
User JPA repository — findByEmail
POST /waba/validate, POST /waba, GET /waba
WABA DTOs — validate/create requests, phone list, WabaResponse (id serialized as String for JS safety)
WABA registry entity — account-scoped, Meta WABA ID, label, status
Waba repo — account-scoped finders + findByAccountIdAndWabaId
Validate WABA against Meta (spec 5.4 error messages), tenant-safe bound-phone flags, idempotent race-safe create, list

REST controller for /api/v1/webhook (single URL per Meta App, no accountId in path) — GET (hub challenge), POST (inbound payload). Verifies X-Hub-Signature-256 via HMAC-SHA256 + MessageDigest.isEqual (constant-time); skipped with WARN if meta.webhook.app-secret empty. Tenant resolved from payload phone_number_id -> AgentRepository.findByPhoneNumberId -> account; unattributable payloads dropped with 200. Persists to webhook_raw, publishes RabbitMQ event.
Raw webhook payload entity — stored before parsing, subject to retention job
RabbitMQ listener — consumes webhook.raw queue, delegates to ConversationService. accountId passed from WebhookRaw entity.
WebhookRaw JPA repository — claimForProcessing (atomic CAS, PENDING→PROCESSING), deleteProcessedBefore (retention cleanup)
Scheduled daily 02:00 purge of PROCESSED/FAILED webhook_raw rows older than webhook.retention.days (default 30)
Claude API client - generate(systemPrompt,userPrompt), wizard-time only, 5s connect/10s read timeouts, fails fast to fallback
Single point of contact for Meta APIs — RestClient (not WebClient). get/post/put/delete. meta.api.version property required.
Meta API error with HTTP status — isNotFound()/isAccessDenied() for spec 5.4 error mapping
App config - port 8080, MySQL, Redis DB0/DB1, RabbitMQ, Meta API, Claude, JWT key paths, ratelimit.* limits (register/login/refresh/generate-defaults)
Flyway V1 — initial schema: business_account, agent, agent_skill, agent_faq, agent_file, agent_website, user tables
Flyway V2 — production schema additions: conversations, messages, webhook_raw, analytics tables
Flyway V3 — adds system_prompt column to agent table
Flyway V4 — adds account_id to agent_faq, agent_skill, agent_file, agent_website, agent_website_page for tenant isolation
Flyway V5 — converts all PK/FK columns to BIGINT UNSIGNED to match TSID generator output
Flyway V6 — adds status (draft/active/paused/deleted) and deployed_at to agent table
Flyway V7 — adds interactive to messages.content_type enum; adds idx_conversations_account_last_message composite index
Migration: waba table (TSID, account-scoped, unique account_id+waba_id); agent.phone_number_id nullable + agent.waba_id column
Migration - additive nullable wizard fields: customer_facing_name, channel enum, tone, language, behavior_rules
Unit test — TsidGenerator: uniqueness, time-ordering, NODE_ID encoding
Integration test — AgentDeployService: deploy sets active, pause sets paused, Meta API first
Integration test — AgentService: createAgent, addFaq, addSkill, tenant isolation
Integration test — full webhook→parse→store→analytics flow via RabbitMQ
Integration test — ConversationStore: findOrCreate idempotency, saveMessage
Unit tests — InboundMessageParser: valid message, missing fields, non-text types
Unit tests — MetaMessageSender: success returns ID, missing ID throws BusinessException
Integration test — AuthController: register, login (200+cookies), wrong password (400), lockout (400 after 5 fails)
Test base — MySQLContainer + RedisContainer (Testcontainers). @MockBean MetaApiClient + ClaudeApiClient. NODE_ID=0.
Test profile — BCrypt cost 4, Flyway enabled, RSA test key pair inline
Boris skill notes — proactive engineering workflow guidance
Drift audit script — diffs knowledge-index.json against files on disk; run after any batch of changes
AWS server details — SSH bastion (13.232.241.246), app server (10.1.17.16), installed services, ports, credentials (dev only)

Legacy Vite scaffold CSS — mostly unused; global styles live in index.css
Root app component — Vite scaffold placeholder, to be replaced with router setup
Root — QueryClientProvider, BrowserRouter. Routes: /login (public). Protected: /dashboard, /agents/new, /agents/:id, /agents, /inbox, /settings via ProtectedRoute+AppShell.
App shell — collapsible brand-navy sidebar (localStorage sidebar-collapsed), off-canvas mobile drawer (dialog ARIA, Escape, backdrop, matchMedia reset), topbar breadcrumb + toggles with aria-controls

Dashboard — stats bar (3 cards), agent list (cards with status/phone/conversations), empty state with CTA, loading skeletons. React Query.

Login/Register page — split panel (navy brand left, white form right). Tab toggle. RHF+Zod validation. brand-pink CTA.
Account Settings — display name, email (read-only badge), plan (Starter hardcoded for P0), Danger Zone with disabled delete button + support contact.
Zustand persist store — user, isAuthenticated, setUser, clearAuth. Persisted to localStorage key 'auth'.

Fixed-window rate limiting filter (Redis DB0 INCR+EXPIRE). Covers register/login/refresh/generate-defaults. Fails open if Redis down. 429 + Retry-After + ApiResponse envelope. Refresh keyed by hashed refresh_token cookie
Unit test RateLimitFilter - passthrough, under/over limit 429, fail-open on Redis error, refresh token-hash key, first-increment expiry
Integration test AnalyticsService - owner summary, cross-tenant NotFound (incl empty-data bypass regression), hourly cross-tenant, empty summary for owner
Integration test WabaService - validate happy path, phone connected flag, persistence with caller accountId, error paths
Unit test StatusUpdateParser - sent/delivered/read/failed, missing statuses, malformed JSON -> empty

Integration test webhook X-Hub-Signature-256 (valid 200, invalid/missing 403), hub challenge GET, and payload tenant resolution (phone_number_id -> agent account persisted; unknown -> dropped with 200)
Integration test WebhookRetentionJob - purges old PROCESSED/FAILED, keeps PENDING and recent rows
